text:
The following discussion of skilled physical therapy services applies the principles in 
§40.2.1 to specific physical therapy services about which questions are most frequently 
raised. 

A. Assessment 

Assuming all other eligibility and coverage requirements have been met, the skills of a 
physical therapist to assess and periodically reassess a patient's rehabilitation needs and 
potential or to develop and/or implement a physical therapy program are covered when 
they are reasonable and
